commit.message:
fix: prevent service kill during AA disconnect cycles

Three-pronged fix for service being killed repeatedly during driving:

1. Override onUpdateNotification to keep foreground service alive whenever
   there's a queue, even when paused. This prevents Android from killing
   the background service after Media3 removes the notification.

2. When AA disconnects and triggers a pause, set pausedByAutoDisconnect
   flag so onPlayWhenReadyChanged does NOT abandon audio focus. This
   keeps the notification posted and the service in foreground.

3. Add scheduleForegroundTimeout (10 min) so the service eventually
   releases resources if the user doesn't resume after an extended pause.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add crash types 19-26, fix post-build analysis accuracy

Crash types added:
- Type 19: RESOURCE_SHRUNK_BY_NAME — getIdentifier() with strict shrinkResources
- Type 20: GENERIC_SIGNATURE_STRIPPED — TypeToken generic type erasure
- Type 21: COMPONENT_CLASS_NOT_FOUND — ComponentName/setClassName string reference
- Type 22: DATA_CLASS_MEMBER_STRIPPED — copy()/componentN() removed by R8 full mode
- Type 23: DYNAMIC_PROXY_STRIPPED — Proxy.newProxyInstance() interface renamed
- Type 24: JSON_ASSET_RESOURCE_STRIPPED — resources referenced only in JSON assets
- Type 25: FRAGMENT_CLASS_RENAMED — FragmentManager saved state FQCN mismatch
- Type 26: SERIALIZABLE_CLASS_RENAMED — cross-build deserialization failure

Plugin improvements:
- Add assetsDirs property to PostBuildAnalysisTask for JSON asset scanning
- Fix SerializableAnalyzer to handle multi-line data class declarations
- Fix KOTLIN_OBJECT_INSTANCE_REMOVED: use renamed-field check not absence check
  (mapping.txt only lists renamed entries; absence means preserved, not removed)
- Fix DEVIRTUALIZATION_ILLEGAL_ACCESS: note whether class was renamed by keep rule
- Improve JAVASCRIPT_INTERFACE and NATIVE_METHOD fix rules to keep class itself
- Add fix rules for types 7, 14, 15, 18 (DataProcessor, WebBridgeHandler, etc.)
- Add HtmlReportGenerator exhaustive when branches for types 24-26

Verification results:
- Crash mode (no keep rules): 29 confirmed errors
- Fix mode (all keep rules applied): 1 remaining (devirtualization — inherent
  code issue, not preventable by ProGuard keep rules alone)

commit.message:
fix: PNG watermark size now matches between preview and exported frames

The PNG watermark was displayed using fixed pixel caps in the preview
(WatermarkOverlay.vue) but FFmpeg overlaid the PNG at its natural/original
size, causing a large mismatch.

Fix: define watermark size as a percentage of the video width, applied
consistently in both places.

Frontend:
- WatermarkOverlay: image now uses width='X%' of the video container
  instead of fixed scaled pixels — matches FFmpeg output 1:1
- ImageOptionsPanel: added slider (1–80%) for PNG watermark size
- useImageOptions: added watermarkImageSize ref (default 15%)
  included in toProcessingOptions() as imageSize field

Backend:
- WatermarkOptions: added image_size: Option<u32> (percentage, default 15)
- ffmpeg.rs: switched from plain overlay to scale2ref filter chain so the
  PNG is scaled to iw*frac relative to the processed video width before
  overlay; works for both frames and animated GIFs
- New test: build_video_filters_image_watermark_custom_size (25% → iw*0.2500)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix security issues in virusxcheck.py

- Remove --apikey/-k and --vt-apikey CLI args to prevent key exposure
  in shell history and process listings. Keys now come only from
  environment variables or .env file.
- Make --save-config prompt interactively for keys instead of accepting
  them as CLI arguments.
- Add validate_hash() with strict hex character validation for all hash
  types. Add compiled SHA256_PATTERN regex for efficient matching.
- Set restrictive file permissions (chmod 600) on .env after writing
  in both update_env_file and update_env_file_multiple.
- Replace blanket warnings.filterwarnings('ignore') and stderr redirect
  to devnull with targeted suppression of InsecureRequestWarning only.
- Replace all exit() calls with sys.exit() for proper non-interactive use.

* fix: regenerate diagrams post-merge instead of on PR branch
